verdict_reasoning: SRC is a non-receptor tyrosine kinase anchored to the inner leaflet of the plasma membrane via N-terminal myristoylation — cytoplasmic-facing and inaccessible to extracellular binders at baseline. However, ecto-SRC / surface-displayed SRC has been documented on tumor cells and in certain cell-state contexts, placing it in the cancer ecto-kinase category alongside other inner-leaflet kinases with reported tumor surface pools. This minority non-baseline surface pool qualifies as contextual / cell_state_induced rather than no.
